title: [Non-record] LoRA TTT + HParams (val_bpb=1.16973333)
body:
## Summary
- add the `2026-03-20_better_baseline_params` record for the 10min/16mb track
- include the submitted `train_gpt.py`, run logs, and aggregated `submission.json`
- document the hyperparameter deltas relative to `2026-03-17_LoRA_TTT`

## Details
This keeps the same LoRA TTT evaluation path as `2026-03-17_LoRA_TTT` and updates the baseline defaults to an 8x768 configuration with a 2048 sequence length, a 262144-token training batch, lower learning rates, lower logit softcap, and `beta1=0.70`.

## Validation
- staged files reviewed locally
- PR is scoped to the currently staged files only
